Title: Instructor Sign-In
User Story: As an instructor, I want to sign in with Google Sign-In or equivalent federated auth so that I can use instructor functions securely.
Acceptance Criteria: - Valid federated sign-in returns successful authentication. - Identity not mapped to an instructor account returns a clear error. - Backend verifies identity before allowing instructor functions.

Title: Student Sign-In
User Story: As a student, I want to sign in with Google Sign-In or equivalent federated auth so that I can use student functions securely.
Acceptance Criteria: - Valid federated sign-in returns successful authentication. - Identity not mapped to a student account returns a clear error. - Backend verifies identity before allowing student functions.

Title: Role and Course Mapping
User Story: As a system, I want to map authenticated users to platform roles and course access so that only authorized users can use protected resources.
Acceptance Criteria: - Authenticated instructor identities are mapped correctly. - Authenticated student identities are mapped correctly. - Server-side authorization rejects unauthorized access. - Authorization enforced in backend.

Title: List Assigned Courses
User Story: As an instructor, I want to list only my assigned courses so that I cannot access unrelated courses.
Acceptance Criteria: - Only assigned courses are returned. - Access to non-assigned courses is rejected. - Another instructor's course is never visible.

Title: List Activities
User Story: As an instructor, I want to list activities in a selected course so that I can choose which activity to manage.
Acceptance Criteria: - Course activity list is returned correctly. - Items include activity number and status. - List order is deterministic.

Title: Create Activity
User Story: As an instructor, I want to create a new activity with text and objectives so that I can prepare class activities.
Acceptance Criteria: - Activity can be created with required fields. - Missing fields returns error. - Duplicate activity number in same course is rejected.

Title: Update Activity
User Story: As an instructor, I want to update activity text and objectives so that I can revise content before class.
Acceptance Criteria: - Only allowed fields can be updated. - Empty patch is rejected. - Non-existent activity returns error.

Title: Start/End Activity
User Story: As an instructor, I want to start and end an activity so that class timing is controlled by the instructor.
Acceptance Criteria: - Start sets state to ACTIVE. - End sets state to ENDED. - ENDED activity cannot accept new score logs.

Title: Student Access Control
User Story: As a student, I want to access activity content only when the activity is ACTIVE so that class rules are enforced.
Acceptance Criteria: - NOT_STARTED activity is not accessible. - ACTIVE activity returns text without objectives. - ENDED activity is not accessible. - Unauthorized student access is rejected.

Title: Tutoring Flow
User Story: As a student, I want to submit answers and receive the next guiding question so that I can progress step by step.
Acceptance Criteria: - First response shows text and one question. - System returns one question per step. - Questions steer toward objectives. - Progress stored per student. - Responses in English. - Blocked if ENDED.

Title: Objective Scoring
User Story: As a system, I want to increase score when an objective is achieved so that grading is objective based.
Acceptance Criteria: - First achievement adds +1. - No repeat points. - All changes logged with metadata. - Immediate score announcement and mini-lesson. - Celebration on completion.

Title: Manual Grading
User Story: As an instructor, I want to enter manual grades for exceptions so that classroom disruptions can be handled.
Acceptance Criteria: - Instructor can submit manual grade. - Manual grade is logged. - Unauthorized instructor access is rejected.

Title: Reset Activity
User Story: As an instructor, I want to reset an activity by deleting all student scores and closing the activity.
Acceptance Criteria: - All score records for course/activity deleted. - State set to ENDED. - New logs blocked after reset.
